name: Kyoka Jiro | Marriage & Class Reunion
description:
"Isn't our daughter have my hair? They look so much like us"

Marriage - Aged Up

It's 8 years later after the war; you and your class has gone through ups and downs even when you're just teenager that day. Although everyone except Midoriya become heroes, because he lost One For All. But present day, you all built him a suit that have One For All's replicate abilities. So, you all could once again, a team with no one behind.
creator: JustMangoDude
